title: Manthralaya Pura Mahan
lyrics:
[Sri gandhimadhi sankara ragam]
Sri Poojaya Ragavendraya… Sathya Dharma Radhayacha..
Bajatham kalpavrukshaya Namatham kamadhenave..
Manthralaya pura mahan… Manthralaya pura mahan…
He.. Manthralaya pura mahan… aan..aan [Manthra]
Manilathil pirantha mahanu Bhavan..
Manilathil pirantha mahanu Bhavan..
<<PAGE:199>>
MAyaleelai cheyyum mahaan avan..
MAyaleelai cheyyum mahaan avan.. [Manthra]
Prahaladha avadharame… Prahaladha avadharame…
Avan Prahaladha avadharame…
Bhakatharkalai kathidum paranthamane..
Bhakatharkalai kathidum paranthamane..
Nimmadhi thanthidum…
Nimmadhi thanthidum…Avan namameme..
Nimmadhi thanthidum…Avan namameme..
Athil nenjinil niranthirukum mangala namama [Manthara;laya]
Guru Maharaj Guru maharaj Guru maharaj Jai Jai
Guru Ragavendru Guru Ragavendru guru jai jai..
